extract: Mesprit (Japanese: エムリット Emrit) is a Psychic-type Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Along with Uxie and Azelf, Mesprit is one of the lake guardians created by Arceus. It is known as the Being of Emotion (Japanese: 感(かん)情(じょう)の神(かみ) Kanjō no Kami, "God of Emotion") in Sinnoh myths.
